item.title: Well this went way deeper than I expected
item.description:
So far so good.
Ah yes.
...sure!
Seems legit?
It has a certain je ne sais quoi.
Reality tenuously holding on here.
We're departing rationality, very quickly.
Surrealism incarnate. Most Viral edit: You like me! You really like me! ??? Thank you all for most viral! For a lowly, most times lurker it is an honor. <3
item.dc:creator: Fimbulvintr

item.title: Anti-trans Texas House candidate Jeff Younger came to the University of North Texas and this is how students responded.
item.description: Source: https://redd.it/198l7o9 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO

item.title: Just a reminder how this multimillionare said the quiet part out loud.
item.description: He later retracted it and said his words were "deeply insensitive" to those who are affected by the cost of living crisis and job losses. So it is all good now.

item.title: On a scale of one, to penguin jumping on a leopard seal, what’s your biggest “oh fuck” moment?
item.description: In Antarctica today, we watched a penguin jump on an iceberg with a leopard seal.

item.title: Glorious Wednesday meme dump (80 000 internet points special)
item.description:
1
2
3. Lord of the Rings unfinished sequel
4. Me at, 10 minutes after I arrive
5. You handsome Imgurians can't relate, but the struggle is real : (
6
7
8
9. How Europeans see Americans (in Texas?)
10
11
12. Yo, whatever happened to that Bill Clinton kid?!
13
14. End of TITANIC be like
15. And finally I would like to thank anyone that has ever upvoted or commented on a post on my profile. I would like to share with you that along with posting on Imgur, I'm into game dev and I'm currently working on this wacky game called "Do Not Press The Button (to Delete the Multiverse). In comedy and tone it's kinda of like The Stanley Parable. And my complex A.I. algorithm that I wrote*, told me that if you like this dump you will probably like the game too. Please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: He will use anyone or anything to achieve his goals
item.description: https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/4408002-lawyer-for-e-jean-carroll-suggests-trump-misrepresented-need-to-adjourn-trial/ This excuse for a human has less than zero moral fibers in his body.
item.dc:creator: RetrogradeLlama

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1082 (Confuscian DnD)
item.description:
We are awake. We are the servants of the Pippin. You will be assimilated. We are chaos. Let's get this bread.
Birds. Are. Dinosaurs. Birds. Are. Dinosaurs.
I'm definitely Radagast.
The Judgement of Stargate
Dapper AF tiger.
Pure Land Buddhism is fascinating to me because of the influences it absorbed from both Manichaeism and Nestorian Christianity, which used to be very abundant religions in Eastern Asia until after the collapse of the Mongol Khanate.
Warring States China was a MESS.
If I met a Trans dude named Curzon, I would lose my everloving shit and buy them so many beers.
We made friends with a new elf druid in our campaign because of tree talk.
This is my favorite form of religious and cultural synchronism
I have an excruciating headache this morning, and I'm trying to figure out if it's from lack of caffeine, a migraine from weather changes, allergies, lack of good sleep because Pippin chewed the CPAP mask so it doesn't fit properly anymore, or just my head being a dick.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good boy. Hello. What? What the fuck? Up." I just finished a painting of a Leptoceratops, and the coloration of this dinosaur was inspired by Pippin. Would imgur like to see it? EDIT: Apparently, Imgur would like to see it, so here we go: https://imgur.com/gallery/Er9aCgR
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: I can’t update my phone unless I get rid of some memes. Please take them.
item.dc:creator: ptothedubs

item.title: Carter is 100X the man Trump can ever hope to be
item.description: https://thehill.com/homenews/campaign/4412019-trump-jimmy-carter-biden-rosalynn/ From the man that mocked a disabled reporter, comes this latest gem. “My wife attended the funeral two months ago of Rosalynn Carter. And it was beautiful. Jimmy Carter was there,” Trump said. “I thought to myself, Jimmy Carter is happy now, because he will go down as a brilliant president by comparison to Joe Biden.” Jimmy is currently in hospice care. Jimmy is also the most moral, generous, and best ex-president we've ever had. That didn't stop Trump from using him as a cheap ploy to attack Biden. https://thehill.com/homenews/campaign/4412019-trump-jimmy-carter-biden-rosalynn/
item.dc:creator: RetrogradeLlama

item.title: Mom has no clue
item.description: Hello MV send me stuff that makes you happy
item.dc:creator: Alivewiththwgloryoflove

item.title: Dumping 37 editions of memes off my phone
item.description:
Good for him!
I'm American, our police don't run...
Good on you, Ethan
I'd sign this petition
This lol is to indicate that my message is not hostile
That's hot
Dunno the sauce, but this is absolutely what trying to host an online class from my home office is like
Pavlov of dog fame inadvertently taught his dogs to really, really enjoy being shocked with electricity... oops. No kink shaming the dogs please.
Me: "I'm the best!" A student: "you are! You're my role model." Me: "oh God. Reconsider."
I'm an aspirin or aleve gal. Tylenol can suck it.
I'll take five.
I was out to lunch with a colleague and told her I didn't like that rite aid near us because "it has CVS vibes". Place is an alternate dimension and I don't like it.
Promised myself I'd never pay for a dating app again. If I was into paying someone to torture me, the apps would've been successful.
Look up the video, it's cute
Wholesome masculinity ftw!
We have not
Started to do this to my gen z students as an elder millennial. Works every time. So does attempting to use their slang. It's lit, fam.
Quality time!
Men are often abused and neglected, or treated like they are all the same. Many men have been awful, but never assume they all are, or you're as bad as those who treat women as inferior. There are lots of good boys out there, bront.
I have a chonky cat too. She's on a diet. No it is not working.
I've seen worse in my classes
At a work event last semester, I grumbled for the first half of our seminar, then at the end gathered a group and provided a piece by piece breakdown of what cheeses were on the charcuterie board. They had a raclette!!!!
Left from July, but probably still applies any time of year. In my redneck neighborhood it does at least...
It is Wednesday my dudes
Ugh, this was from when I started dating a guy at work. Six months later he still wouldn't admit we were dating, so I walked away. I don't have to let someone treat me like a convenience. Second time that's happened too...
I'm going to hell for my sense of humor but I'll be laughing the entire time
He's right though
Kif, do it without the prolonged sighing, it's picking up on the mic
Accurate
Clarice has wares if you have coin. (Yes her left eye is blind, but she's fine, it's been checked by a vet. Left over from uveitis as a kitten.)
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.title: Images of Note: wakey wakey eggs and bakey
item.description:
HELL YEAH
Santa Bear
mood
:)
:)
That is a concerning way of putting it.
H O L E W I Z A R D
A Wednesday frog on a WEDNESDAY????
kbity!
WHO FOUND THIS PIC OF ME?!
P I S S
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
